zh.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley於1271年4月出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，他的父親Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley26歲，母親Joan de Ferrers24歲。他於1289年與Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1326年5月31日在英國波克夏瓦林福德享年55歲，埋葬在英國布里斯托布里斯托 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley于1271年4月出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，他的父亲Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley26岁，母亲Joan de Ferrers24岁。他于1289年与Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1326年5月31日在英国波克夏瓦林福德享年55岁，埋葬在英国布里斯托布里斯托 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley was born in April 1271, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, was 26 and his mother, Joan de Ferrers, was 24. He married Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley in 1289, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 31 May 1326, in Wallingford, Berkshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Bristol Cathedral, Bristol, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley est né en avril 1271, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan de Ferrers, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley en 1289, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 31 mai 1326, à Wallingford, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Bristol Cathedral, Bristol, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley im April 1271 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley 26 und seine Mutter Joan de Ferrers 24. Er hat 1289 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Mai 1326 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Wallingford, Berkshire, England und wurde in Bristol Cathedral, Bristol, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley è nato il nel aprile 1271 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Ferrers, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley nel 1289, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 31 maggio 1326, nel Wallingford, Berkshire, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Bristol Cathedral, Bristol, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeleyが1271年4月にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeleyは26歳，母Joan de Ferrersは24歳であった。1289年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーでEva la Zouche Baroness Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1326年5月31日にイギリスバークシュアイアワリングフォードで55歳で死去し，イギリスブリストルブリストル カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley(이)가 1271년 4월 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Ferrers(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1326년 5월 31일 영국 버크실르 월링퍼드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 브리스톨 브리스톨 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley nasceu em abril de 1271, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Ferrers, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley em 1289, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de maio de 1326, em Wallingford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Bristol Cathedral, Bristol, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley родился апрель 1271 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Ferrers, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley в 1289 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 31 мая 1326 г. в местности валлингфорд, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности бристол кэтедраль, бристол, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley nació en abril de 1271, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Berkeley 1st Baron Berkeley, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan de Ferrers, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley en 1289, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 31 de mayo de 1326, en Wallingford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Bristol Cathedral, Bristol, Inglaterra.
